S
sub
stable Install Commands GitHub ↗

APT Repository

The polyglot
hacking CLI

One command. Ten languages. Zero compromise.
Python · C · Rust · Kotlin · Java · Haxe · CUDA · ASM · M4 · Bash

Python C / gcc Rust Kotlin Java Haxe → C++ CUDA C++ NASM M4 Bash

01 — Install

Add the APT repository

bash 
# 1. Add GPG key
curl -fsSL https://subhobhai943.github.io/sub/sub.gpg.key \
  | sudo gpg --dearmor -o /etc/apt/keyrings/sub.gpg

# 2. Add repository source
echo "deb [signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/sub.gpg] https://subhobhai943.github.io/sub stable main" \
  | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/sub.list

# 3. Install
sudo apt update
sudo apt install sub

02 — Quick Start

Try it out

bash 
sub help                     # all commands + backend status
sub whoami                   # identity card (M4 → Haxe → Python)
sub ports 192.168.1.1        # port scan (C → Kotlin → Python)
sub gpuinfo                  # GPU info (CUDA → nvidia-smi → lspci)
sub weather Durgapur         # live weather (pure Bash)
sub hashid <hash>            # identify hash type (Rust)
sub geoip 8.8.8.8            # geo-locate an IP (Kotlin)
sub sysinfo                  # system info (ASM → Python)

03 — Commands

Available commands

sub whoami
Identity card with system details
M4 · Haxe · CUDA · Kotlin · Python
sub ports <host>
Fast non-blocking port scanner
C · Kotlin · Python
sub gpuinfo
GPU details — works without CUDA
CUDA · nvidia-smi · lspci · sysfs
sub weather [city]
Live weather, auto-detects city
Bash · curl · wttr.in
sub hashid <hash>
Identify hash type (MD5, SHA-*…)
Rust · Python
sub geoip <ip>
Geo-locate any IPv4/IPv6 address
Kotlin · Python
sub sysinfo
CPU, RAM, OS — bare metal speed
NASM · Python
sub subdomain <host>
Subdomain probe via TCP connect
Rust · Python
sub banner-grab <host>
Grab service banner from a port
Kotlin · Python
sub pwcheck <pass>
Password strength analyser
Rust
sub caesar <text> <n>
Caesar cipher encode / decode
Rust
sub b64 <text>
Base64 encode / decode
Rust · Python

04 — Stack

Language backends

Python — master CLI C / gcc — port scanner Rust — recon / crypto Kotlin — network tools Java — JVM fallback Haxe → C++ — whoami CUDA C++ — gpuinfo NASM — sysinfo M4 macros — static whoami Bash — weather

Each command tries the fastest available backend first and falls back gracefully — zero hard dependencies at runtime.

Built by Subhadip Sarkar

View on GitHub ↗
